results.title: Roberto Martinez is new Scotland manager favourite after surge of support for Spaniard
results.description: Martinez now leads the betting ahead of Davie Moyes, Steven Naismith and John McGlynn after stepping down from his role with Portugal

results.title: Why Colts walk tightrope with Jonathan Taylor's usage
results.description: Indy needs to keep Taylor healthy, but it also needs his production. Can the Colts afford to rest him?
